title: Ice Age - Frozen World
description: The ice age is back! Use your favorite biome mods and survive in a frozen world
body:
# Ice Age
This mod will turn your world into a vast icy landscape.
It changes world generation by allowing only cold biomes to spawn, creating a unique and immersive icy survival experience.

Ice Age is compatible with many world generation and biome mods, such as Terralith and Biomes O’ Plenty (BOP), and is generally designed to work well with a wide range of mods. This allows you to combine your favorites and create your own unique world.

Ice Age is ideal for modpacks focused on extreme survival. With the addition of other survival mods, the harsh climate and scarcity of food can turn your adventure into a real challenge...
Or you can just enjoy the snow and the winter atmosphere

![Icy landscape ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/741f9536e11cec58a856b56e9cdf954597863dc8_0.webp)

![Icy landscape 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c3de858af87506e6da5b4d619de6875cc3d2345_0.webp)

## How to use it

Select the button of Natural Temperature before the creation of a world

![net tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6298a6ecf2e27d18329cf128928c141389a816d5_0.webp)

Select mode 101

![general tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e00fd0968c92195c1db459b51c19df88e7e0298.png)

Set the custom ID to " FrozenWorld "

![Custom modes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64a61acaf29249cc21e0a2b6609afc9274e4b694.png)

Press done and generate the world. Have fun!
